summary: Hardened Service Bus gRPC connection resolution to prefer functions-uri, require explicit credentials, allow insecure loopback only, and updated ServiceBusMessageActions to consume the resolved transport settings; validated with targeted mocha tests and eslint.

testsRun.command: cd /workspace/repo/azure-functions-nodejs-extensions-servicebus && ./node_modules/.bin/mocha --require ts-node/register test/servicebus/ServiceBusMessageActions.test.ts test/util/grpcUriBuilder.test.ts && ./node_modules/.bin/eslint src/util/grpcUriBuilder.ts src/servicebus/ServiceBusMessageActions.ts src/grpcClientFactory.ts test/servicebus/ServiceBusMessageActions.test.ts test/util/grpcUriBuilder.test.ts

followUps: Run the full servicebus package test/build matrix on Node 20 once grpc-tools binary downloads are available; local dependency install required npm ci --ignore-scripts because upstream registries returned 503s.
